- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

A paired device session with limited pairing scope could enumerate global pairing state and act on pairing requests that belonged to another device within the same gateway scope ceiling.

This is a same-gateway paired-device authorization bug, not a remote unauthenticated issue. Severity is low.

## Fix

Pairing management actions are now limited to the caller device, so non-admin paired-device sessions cannot approve or operate on unrelated pending device requests.

Fix commit:

- `5a12f30441d5b0b151f550daa2c5c9e8db61e2e6`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/5a12f30441d5b0b151f550daa2c5c9e8db61e2e6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Paired-device pairing actions were not limited to the caller device", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-25T23:49:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xrq9-jm7v-g9h7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw: Paired-device pairing actions were not limited to the caller device
